$schema: Replay fixture for fork child agent TUI E2E: valid handoff text response

messages.content: Produce exactly a valid fork handoff report

deltas.content:
## 1. Result / status

No filesystem changes made. The fork child completed the test task successfully.

## 2. Scope and authority

This is a test handoff for TUI E2E proof of the fork child lifecycle. Only the fork child startup, LLM handoff, finalization, and auto-exit path is exercised.

## 3. Navigation / tool trail

No tools were used. The response was generated from the replay fixture.

## 4. Evidence and context discovered

No evidence was discovered beyond the test fixture data.

## 5. Changes made

No filesystem changes made. No files were created, modified, or deleted.

## 6. Data/control flow

Fork child boot -> TUI start -> process transport -> controller fork start -> LLM replay -> handoff generation -> terminal run -> ForkRunTerminalWatcher finalization -> ForkAutoExitRegistrar -> TUI stop -> exit marker.

## 7. Validation performed

This handoff is validated by ForkHandoffValidator to ensure all mandatory sections are present and section 1 contains a filesystem-changes statement.

## 8. Risks, gaps, and gotchas

None for this test handoff.

## 9. Reusable learnings

None.

## 10. Continuation context

None.

## 11. Final handoff

This concludes the test fork child handoff. All mandatory sections (## 1 Result/status, ## 5 Changes made, ## 11 Final handoff) are present and the filesystem-changes statement in section 1 is valid. The fork child lifecycle successfully completed end-to-end.
